"[2] ^TRAFFIC ADVISORY UPDATE IN EAST LOS ANGELES: E CESAR E CHAVEZ AVE WILL BE CLOSED FROM HUMPHREYS AVE TO MARIANNA AVE. EASTERN AVE WILL ALSO BE CLOSED FROM DOZIER ST TO NEW YORK ST. CLOSURE WILL REMAIN IN EFFECT UNTIL FURTHER NOTICE DUE TO A TRAFFIC HAZARD. REF LOG: 3070"
